method: Compositional reasoning via ghb decomposition with SC-shared extension

theorems.theorem_4: Disjoint-Variable Composition: If patterns P_i have Vars(P_i) ∩ Vars(P_j) = ∅, then ghb(P) = ⋃ ghb(P_i), and P is safe iff all P_i are safe.
theorems.theorem_5: SC-Shared Composition: If all accesses to shared variables use SC ordering, shared accesses form total order S. P is safe iff each ghb_local(C_i) ∪ S|_{C_i} is acyclic.
theorems.corollary_5_1: Separable Thread-Local: Under Theorem 5 conditions, if thread-local ops in each component are separable from SC shared ops, each component's internal ordering is preserved.
theorems.proposition_7: Shared-Variable Unsafety: When patterns share variables without SC ordering, individual safety does NOT guarantee program safety. Conservative RG analysis applies.
